name: sendlens
description: Privacy-first outbound campaign analysis for AI workspaces.

scripts.build:hosts: pluxx build --target claude-code cursor codex opencode
scripts.ci:plugin: npm run test:plugin && npm run validate:plugin && npm run lint:plugin && npm run test:host-bundles
scripts.test:plugin:smoke: npm run --silent build:plugin && node scripts/test-provider-config-setup-doctor.mjs && node scripts/test-sql-guard.mjs && node scripts/test-prompt-contracts.mjs
scripts.test:plugin:fast: npm run test:plugin:smoke && node scripts/test-smartlead-client.mjs && node scripts/test-smartlead-ingest.mjs && node scripts/test-provider-workspace-views.mjs && node scripts/test-refresh-status-scoped-miss.mjs && node scripts/test-campaign-analysis-depth.mjs && node scripts/test-campaign-analysis-response.mjs && node scripts/test-reply-fetch-contract.mjs
scripts.test:plugin: npm run test:plugin:fast && node scripts/test-db-lock-retry.mjs && node scripts/test-refresh-launch-lock.mjs && node scripts/test-ingest-template-fixtures.mjs && node scripts/test-instantly-client-pagination.mjs && node scripts/test-local-plugin-sampling.mjs && node scripts/test-local-plugin-runtime.mjs && node scripts/test-cache-identity.mjs && node scripts/test-reply-hydration-db-reuse.mjs && node scripts/test-demo-workspace.mjs && node scripts/test-load-campaign-data-runtime.mjs && node scripts/test-mcp-response-contract.mjs && node scripts/test-mcp-version-sync.mjs
